src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpFil.general_idea: Allow the command line parser to ignore unmatched arguments to prevent execution failures on unexpected inputs.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxAp.general_idea: Exclude RSocket auto-configuration classes to reduce classpath scanning overhead or resolve conflicts in the newer Spring Boot version.
Implement RuntimeHintsRegistrar to register specific resource patterns for GraalVM native image generation, ensuring these resources are included in the native image.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.general_idea: Enable reading HTTP request code or body data directly from standard input for piping.
Add support for generating shell completion scripts (e.g., zsh) via a new command-line option.
Introduce support for loading and displaying global variables from a user-specific configuration file.
Allow specifying an HTTP proxy via command-line argument or environment variable.
Add a command-line option to specify request body data from text, file, or URL.
Add a flag to execute all requests defined in the HTTP file sequentially.
Load environment variables from VS Code settings.json to support Rest Client integration.
Support executing HTTP requests defined in a JSON extension format via stdin.
Implement functionality to write HTTP responses to a specified file.
Add executors for numerous new protocols including WebSocket, GraphQL, Dubbo, Redis, SSH, and AWS.
Enhance logic for resolving the default index.http file by searching parent directories and user home.
Replace direct Jackson ObjectMapper usage with a utility class for consistent JSON handling.
Capture unmatched command-line arguments to allow passing extra variables to the request context.
Update the CLI version string to reflect the new release.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.general_idea: Make GrpcExecutor implement the BaseExecutor interface to conform to the new execution contract.
Change the execute method return type from void to List<byte[]> to satisfy the BaseExecutor interface.
Add return statements to provide the response body or empty list, ensuring the method compiles with the new return type.
Replace direct usage of Jackson ObjectMapper with a project-specific JsonUtils utility for JSON processing.
Replace standard error printing with a structured HttpxErrorCodeLogger for better error tracking.
Invoke runJsTest to allow JavaScript-based validation of the gRPC response.
Pretty-print the JSON output before printing to stdout for better readability.
Refactor scheme checking to explicitly handle https/grpcs as insecure and default others to plaintext.
Remove explicit null check for headers, assuming the caller or framework ensures non-null headers.
Refactor HttpExecutor to extend HttpBaseExecutor to share common HTTP execution logic.
Add logic to ignore specific internal headers (x-json-type, x-json-schema, x-args-*, x-body-name) when setting request headers.
Support disabling automatic redirects via a 'no-redirect' tag in the request.
Inject cookies associated with the request host into the HTTP client.
Support a custom 'CHATGPT' HTTP method by mapping it to a POST request.
Delegate response handling and blocking logic to a base class method instead of inline implementation.
Change execute method to return a list of byte arrays instead of void, enabling response data retrieval.
RSocketExecutor now implements the BaseExecutor interface to conform to the new execution contract.
Replaced static error hooks and printStackTrace calls with a structured HttpxErrorCodeLogger for better observability.
Changed execute and helper methods to return List<byte[]> instead of void to support the new executor contract.
Refactored the request type dispatch logic to use a Java switch expression for cleaner control flow.
Added support for GRAPHQL and GRAPHQLRS request types, routing subscriptions to streams and others to request-response.
Extended URI scheme handling to recognize 'rsocket' as a valid TCP transport scheme alongside 'tcp'.
Enhanced payload text conversion to pretty-print JSON responses when the content type is JSON.
Modified requestStream to buffer all payload data into a list of byte arrays before returning, rather than just printing.
Added a call to runJsTest in requestResponse to allow JavaScript-based validation of the HTTP response.
